name: odoo-ai-skills
description: Local-first Odoo 17/18/19 runtime verification and deploy gate for AI-written Odoo changes.

interface.shortDescription: Read Odoo runtime truth before coding
interface.longDescription: Odoo development skills for Codex. Read fields, MRO, views, security, runtime traces, state, reverse field impact, load state, and deploy evidence from the running instance before writing or reviewing Odoo code.
defaultPrompt: Use odoo-ai-skills for this Odoo task.
Inspect runtime truth before changing Odoo code.
Review this Odoo patch for security, MRO, migration, and runtime risks.
